creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
FREE Grocery Store in NYC 📍The Polymarket

The Polymarket is located at 137 7th Ave South in the West Village.

Free Grocery Hours:
2pm-5pm on Thursday & Friday(until supplies last)
12pm-3pm on Sunday(until supplies last)

Free Flowers and Valentines Cards:
12pm on Saturday(until supplies last)

Community donation hours:
5pm-6pm Thursday & Friday
3pm-6pm Sunday

#nyc #NewYork #travel #visitnyc #nybucketlist

transcription.text: New York City's first ever free grocery store is officially open and here's everything you need to know. Located in the West Village, you'll find the Polly Market where you can just walk in, fill your bag with fresh produce, bread, pasta, drinks, olive oil, cleaning supplies, snacks, peanut butter, seasonings, flowers, and then walk right out with no purchase necessary. The Polly Market grocery store is open from now until Sunday.
